# Failed Strategy Gate Fixture

## Paper Identity

- **Slug:** failed-strategy-gate
- **Title:** Operating Model Direction Memo
- **Purpose:** decision_memo
- **Channel:** internal
- **Risk:** internal_high
- **Complexity:** standard
- **Audience shape:** prioritized_multi

## Current State

This fixture models an internal memo that is trying to recommend an operating model direction before the brief is ready. The strategy gate blocks downstream work because the thesis, audience priority, and intended decision are not yet specific enough.

## Privacy Boundary

The fixture uses synthetic organization and role descriptions only. It must not contain real person names, company names, employer names, job titles, local paths, or private source material.
